text.tspan: [MUST precede exec — sets PT_PTRACED in task_struct]
[this stop is setup, not a syscall stop]
[resumes tracee; stop at next syscall boundary]
[RE-INJECT: pass signal to tracee on resume]
NEVER pass 0 — that suppresses the signal

ul.li: After exec, the process image is replaced — setup code is gone
The PT_PTRACED flag must be set BEFORE exec so the kernel knows to deliver SIGTRAP at exec completion
If PTRACE_TRACEME is called after exec, the initial SIGTRAP has already fired and been lost — the tracer's first waitpid would block forever
